items.title: XELOC Release
items.body: Thank you for using XELOC. A wallet powered by the XRP Ledger.

items.title: System Maintenance Notice
items.body: The system will be down from 00:00 to 00:00 on April 20 for scheduled maintenance.

items.title: Added News Feature
items.body: We've added a news feature to the app. Get updates when you launch.
